===''Pokémon the Series''=== ====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''==== Opal first appeared in ''[[JN055|The Tale of You and Glimwood Tangle!]]'', where she encountered {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] in [[Ballonlea]] and challenged them to a series of quizzes. In the process, Opal made them and their Pokémon wear pink clothes for each wrong answer they got. As [[Chloe]] reunited with the group, Opal revealed that she had asked the quizzes to keep the boys from recklessly searching for Chloe and let her come to them on her own. She reappeared again in ''[[JN082|The Sweet Taste of Battle!]]'', where she hosted a cake-decorating contest dubbed the [[All-Alcremie Decoration Challenge]] at the [[Ballonlea Stadium]], inviting Ash, Goh, Chloe, [[Raihan]], and {{an|Leon}} to participate. She loaned each contestant one of her {{p|Alcremie}} to provide them cream. After the cakes had been decorated, Opal tasted each of them to determine the winner, ultimately choosing Ash's cake as the winner. Unexpectedly, she then challenged Ash to a battle. During the battle, Opal [[Gigantamax]]ed her Alcremie and had her use {{m|G-Max Finale}} on [[Ash's Pikachu]]. Eating all the cream created by the [[G-Max Move]] caused Pikachu to grow giant and fat, making him too full to continue battling, so the match was called off. Afterwards, Opal joined the contestants in eating all the cakes they had decorated. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Opal's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie |giga=yes |gender=female |type1=Fairy |img=Opal Alcremie.png |cap=Opal's Alcremie |img2=Opal Gigantamax Alcremie.png |cap2=Opal's Gigantamax Alcremie |epnum=JN082 |epname=The Sweet Taste of Battle! |vajp= |vaen=Ryan Bartley |desc=Opal sent this {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Alcremie|Ruby Cream}} {{p|Alcremie}} out to battle [[Ash's Pikachu]]. After a while, Opal [[Gigantamax]]ed her and had her use {{m|G-Max Finale}} on Pikachu. This caused Pikachu to grow giant and fat from eating the immense amounts of cream the [[G-Max Move]] created, so the battle had to be called off. Alcremie's known moves are {{m|Attract}} and {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}.
As a Gigantamax Alcremie, she can use {{m|G-Max Finale}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie (multiple) |gender=female |type1=Fairy |img=Opal Alcremie anime 1.png |cap=Opal's Alcremie |img2=Opal Alcremie anime 2.png |cap2=Opal's Alcremie |epnum=JN082 |epname=The Sweet Taste of Battle! |vajp= |vaen=Ryan Bartley |desc=Opal owns several {{p|Alcremie}} that she lent to the participants of the [[All-Alcremie Decoration Challenge]]. None of Alcremie's moves are known.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{fairy color}}|bordercolor={{fairy color dark}} |ja=鳳芳野 ''[[Yoshino Ohtori]]'' |en=Marin M.
